name: io.github.Explorer-64/stackapps-suite-mcp
description: StackApps suite gateway: PWA icons, splash screens, AI images. Pay per call in USDC via x402.

environmentVariables.name: WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: EVM wallet private key for signing x402 USDC payments on Base mainnet. Wallet must hold USDC.

environmentVariables.name: STACKAPPS_MAX_USD_PER_CALL
environmentVariables.description: Per-call payment cap in USD (default 0.50). The server refuses to sign challenges above this.
